channel.title: Documents on Wesole Nutki - Preschool
channel.description: Recent content in Documents on Wesole Nutki - Preschool

item.title: Preschool Statute
item.description:
Wesole Nutki Preschool Statute

The statute defines the basic principles of preschool operation, rights and obligations of children and parents.

Key information:

  • Organization of preschool work
  • Rights and obligations of parents
  • Recruitment rules
  • Cooperation with parents

item.title: Child Enrollment Form
item.description:
Child Enrollment Form

Official child enrollment form for Wesole Nutki preschool, compliant with GDPR requirements.

Form contents:

  • Personal data of child and parents
  • Health information
  • Consents and declarations
  • GDPR clauses

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Wesole Nutki preschool attaches great importance to the protection of personal data of children and parents.

Document scope:

  • Personal data controllers
  • Data processing purposes
  • Rights of data subjects
  • Personal data security measures
  • Cookie policy

All personal data is processed in accordance with the Regulation of the European Parliament and of the Council (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).
